# Gap Register

GAP-LAU-01 | P2 | OPEN | multilingual-research | R-LAU | Laundry room specification gaps: (1) drum opening height 380–915 mm AFF — only ADA S611 provides quantified spec; all other jurisdictions silent on appliance height; (2) clear floor 762×1219 mm parallel to appliance; (3) turning radius 1500mm shared/1300mm residential confirmed in SV/DE/AU/US; (4) main-floor location requirement (basement = categorical exclusion). Guidebook R-LAU item requires spec expansion | 2026-03-18 17:00
GAP-LAU-02 | P3 | OPEN | multilingual-research | R-LAU | NDIS SDA High Physical Support specifies laundry appliances accessible from seated/standing with adjustable height — this is the most advanced jurisdiction-specific provision; consider as best-practice tier for R-LAU | 2026-03-18 17:00
GAP-A09-01 | P1 | OPEN | multilingual-research | A-09 | CRITICAL: A-09 cites 0.1 m/s RMS as vibration isolation threshold for disability populations. This value does not correspond to any located ISO 2631-1, ISO 10137, or BS 6472 threshold. ISO 2631-1 uses weighted acceleration (m/s²); 0.1 m/s velocity may be from DIN 4150-2 (structural vibration, Germany) but its application to built-environment disability design is unverified. Garcia-Mendez 2013 confirms WC users exceed ISO 2631-1 health caution zone in daily use. No disability-specific floor vibration standard exists in any of 14 languages searched. SOURCE OF 0.1 m/s THRESHOLD MUST BE VERIFIED BEFORE PUBLICATION | 2026-03-18 17:00
GAP-A09-02 | P2 | OPEN | multilingual-research | A-09 | ISO 2631-1 was explicitly NOT designed for SCI/disability populations (Chénier & Aissaoui 2014) — any citation of ISO 2631-1 in A-09 must carry this caveat; populations for whom A-09 is most relevant (MOB/SCI) are precisely those for whom the standard is least validated | 2026-03-18 17:00
REVIEW-LAU-A09-01 | REVIEW | OPEN | workplan-orchestrator | A-09 + R-LAU | 2 escalation signals: A-09 has an unverified threshold cited as normative (P1); R-LAU lacks jurisdictional breadth for spec confidence. Recommend: (1) citation-verifier targeted run on A-09 0.1 m/s source; (2) item-specification-writer pass on R-LAU with ADA S611 as primary reference | 2026-03-18 17:00
